pi_items.source: task.json description and setup_task.sh implementation match this code
WooCommerce REST API documentation confirms amount field format as numeric string with decimal places. Task description specifies '$20 fixed cart discount'
WooCommerce REST API documentation confirms 'fixed_cart' is one of three valid discount_type values (percent, fixed_cart, fixed_product). Applies fixed amount to entire cart
WooCommerce REST API documentation confirms minimum_amount field format as numeric string. Task description specifies 'Minimum spend of $75.00'. Verifier checks this field correctly

Task description requires 'Limit to the Clothing category only'. Setup script creates this category if it doesn't exist via 'wp wc product_cat create --name=Clothing'. Verifier checks coupon product_categories list includes 'Clothing'

privileged_info_summary: The create_restricted_coupon task creates a WooCommerce coupon with code CLOTHING-DEAL applying a fixed_cart discount of 20.00 with a minimum_amount requirement of 75.00, restricted to the Clothing product category, and excluding sale items. The environment uses a real WooCommerce instance running in Docker with MariaDB backend, accessed via WP-CLI. All metadata values are verified against WooCommerce REST API specifications and match task requirements.
